review_title: User Review on Zoho Projects for 3D Animation Used Case!
description: It is value for money as compared to how Asana is priced and is affordable for Companies who is exploring and starting with such tools. Employee management and users can be easily monitored seeing the time they have spent on the project.
author: Jay B.
pros: I liked the Time Log and UI Flexibilities and the Task System Overall with Reports which can be easily accessible for monitoring the projects.
cons: I disliked the UI creativity, there are lot of options but still it lacks that user friendliness of making task, sub task, task decscription and its confusing as compared to Asana as per UI is the concern, It should have a project briefing and atatchments module like Asana has at the start of the project.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Project management well made with the Zoho ecosystem
description: We manage projects of development and consultancy with it, some development projects are connected to Sprints and the overall company is connected to the Zoho ecosystem, which is its biggest strenght.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Projects and tasks can be customised with a lot of detail. It's connected with the Zoho Suite and specially with Sprints and Desk/Bugtracker, which is great. If the team gets along with the "philosophy" it can track projects and costs in a very professional way. New UI is cool, much better than the previous one.
cons: As all Zoho tools, it can be a little overwhelming to set-up properly, specially on your own without a consultant. If you want something very agile, like Trello, maybe it's not the best tool for you.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Good solid system but lacks some features.
description: Overall good and workable system but has its pros and cons which users have to adapt and sometimes it is a little harder. Support is helpful but takes a while.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great project organization with many options. Fast and modern interface. Logical setup of projects and tasks and users.
cons: Missing project AI features and complicated setup once you have more than 10 projects. It takes a while to learn the in and outs of the system and to get setup. Some limitations exists when setting up templates.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: A solid PM software, especially if you're already using other Zoho tools
description: We were considering Zoho as an alternative to our current software, Accelo. It was a solid option, but just didn't quite fit in all the right places for our team. I wish Accelo could take notes from Zoho's mobile app approach - that was a standout for us.
author: David V.
pros: The value of Zoho projects felt like it delivered and was pretty competitive compared to the other options we considered. It's a great tool if you're already comfortable or setup in the Zoho suite of products - and the mobile app remains superior to anything else I've seen.
cons: The UI was a little crowded and confusing for some of our team to navigate and slowed down some workflows. We are always trying to customize reports for different clients, but it felt like we never got the desired output we were after.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zoho Projects is totally a masterpiece, feature rich project management tool.
description: In our organisation we have a truly remarkable experience with Zoho Projects as it offer features for managing our projects efficiently. The seamless integration with other apps we use is a great plus.
author: Sara B.
pros: Love Zoho Projects for project management, provide us with great UI and amazing dashboard that has everything we need for our projects.Breakdown complex tasks into simple one and assign members for quick follow up and completion before due date.Automatic reminders are available which is a huge plus.Provides tools like gantt charts and kanban boards for viewing tasks.I find it budget friendly with scalable pricing that's is no extra cost for features. Task automation is available for repetitive tasks.Built in chats ,comments and discussions forums allow real time communication and collaboration.
cons: There is nothing that detests me from this platform, services are amazing and integration is easy.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: If you are happy to Google, a lot, when trying out Zoho, you will be pleasantly surprised. If you are adverse to Googling, you will struggle.
author: Alicia B.
pros: Functionality is great, it really caters for everything one can ask for. It helped us upgrade from a team of 2 to a team of 4.
cons: Lack of physical support option. The different options and Zoho offerings is really confusing. There is a lack of physical support which adds to the frustration. I don't want to speak to someone online, I want someone the physically sit with me and show me how everything works.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: If only they could secure data
description: It was great, except needs more security of data, I also found that I was constantly needing to buy addons. The modules didnt really talk to one another efficiently and there was duplication of purpose.
author: Pippa B.
pros: Detailed, efficient, affordable. Visually easy to navigate, current, support is good. Lots of scope.
cons: Spam emails after signup, duplication of purpose of modules. Lack of consistency across modules. Having to pay for functions that should have been part of the original package subscription.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: User friendly software - with lots of automation - the spreadsheets are a blessing as we usually do costings on excel
author: Nazmeera M.
pros: the workflow automation allows us to create rules to automate projects tasks. The spreadsheet upload is great to complete then convert to an invoice
cons: the menu seems complicated - however i think if we go through it then we can learn from each fields the advantages
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: A versatile and powerful tool, which brings competitive advantages with the competition in the market
author: Bruno A.
pros: Distribution of hours entered in the timesheet between employees and projects in an organic way
cons: lack of testing or demo of the simplest licenses
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Excellent software witha good price point for small companies.
author: Carlos Z.
pros: This software has really important tools which can be found in other software but done in a really accesible, enterprise connected way. Our company uses several zoho tools which had become essential in our functioning.
cons: A little bit difficult, it lacks the simplicity of software like Monday, but it's amazing in some other ways.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is great software to use and it is always there for me to continue to use on a daily time and it works for all my side works
author: Bradley J.
pros: I have used many different software and I always go back to projects because using the zoho platform makes moving inbetween great.
cons: I really don't have much of a con but I would say that one would be the fact i can not get it to intergrated with one of my softwares
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Another great Zoho option for small businesses
description: It's very versatile for what's your business might need, offering a straightforward platform to do things like plan, track, and collaborate on projects.
author: Amber L.
pros: Zoho Projects impressed me with a lot of features that were designed to small and medium-sized businesses and offered affordable pricing.
cons: The app has limited functions, only offering a few things that you can perform effectively on a mobile device.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zoho projects brings visibility across the business operations are equally agile.
description: It’s enabled us to run projects more openly between departments. Deadlines are more visible, and it’s easier to see potential bottlenecks before they gum up the works of production or compliance.
author: Tim A.
pros: The task dependencies and Gantt chart are perfect for keeping our regulatory, R&D and supply chain teams in sync with launch timelines. I also love how well it works with Zoho CRM.
cons: There are some features, such as recurring tasks and custom views, that aren’t quite as flexible as we’d prefer. We were required to rework workflows to suit our standards of the pharmaceutical process.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: It’s helped us keep track of copywriting, design and client approvals all in one timeline. We never miss another deadline and that has enabled us to bill more accurately due to time logs. Great for small marketing teams.
author: Imogen R. A.
pros: Zoho Projects helps us keep our marketing deliverables in order particularly where campaigns are getting delivered across a range of media and maybe even have delivery dates for various formats. The Gantt charts and task dependencies have saved my life.
cons: UI is a little dated so its a bit clunky when assigning subtasks or when in bigger projects. It could be more intuitive as well I would add. And the mobile app is not as easy.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: TGE BEST PLATFORM FOR MANAGING YOUR PROJECT
description: I have used zoho projects for 2.3 years and it was a nice experience It really serves the purpose
author: Dr.Enoch E.
pros: Super easy to use Intuitive to navigate Customer service is legit It is cost effective Assists us manage our projects
cons: Theres nothing wrong with Zoho projects It really worked so we'll for me and my colleagues
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Its very good Tool for Project Management Lifecycle, we are getting all the data, related each Project
author: Aravind M.
pros: Its good & User Friendly, well designed for Project Management Milestone based Work Breakdown Structure.
cons: Milestone based task assignment Task Delegation Productivity Tracker Easy accessibility Fully dynamic
author_profession: Head BP HR Gen Admin HSE IT and QMS
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Overall product is very good, and we can start using it without guidance. UI is simple. However, regarding pricing I find it little higher compared to features getting.
author: Yadnyesh K.
pros: Simplicity and easy to start with. Self-explanatory product with good mobile app and excellent light weight UI.
cons: Less control and also time log split is not there while approving billable quantity. Even control on cost vs price is not extensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall experience is good so far. We implemented it on managers hierarchy and seeing to implement throughout organizatiob
author: Tanvi G.
pros: Zoho projects is a Good project management tools where you can see dashboard and reports for tasks status.
cons: Little bit issues with reading reports and notification. If comments are skipped from notification then it do not go to unread section on task
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great product to use for managing Mutiple projects and integration of with different apps like Zoho People, Analytics, and other org apps
author: Prudhvi P.
pros: User friendly interface and accessibility for handling Mutiple projects and user time logs and milestones tracking
cons: Integration with all other Zoho apps and Automation options with unique rule creation as part of work flows
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Thank you, it was a feel good experience
description: very satisfied with the customer support, they are very flexible and are always open for negotiation
author: Rakesh M.
pros: This is the most cost effective tool you will every get with simplicity in the UI and better overall performance
cons: More base lines can be added, the freeware's that i used has more baselines and this can be an improvement
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent, in that the software platform presents a family of related products that help support you no matter how fast you grow.
author: John W.
pros: Ease of use. It was easy to have new users join and become useful right away. It was our communication platform.
cons: Too many features. This sometimes let new users frustrated because they thought you would have to know how th use all the features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good Tool for Project and task Management
description: Overall Eperience is good comparing other Tool
author: Praveen K.
pros: Task Management and Issue tracker and Reports Generation also good
cons: User Assigning for Projects.it will little bit confusion for beginning time
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: It is simple to track project progress when working with Zoho Projects .
author: Kamakshi S.
pros: I can easily customize Zoho Projects according to my needs. It is simple to view project status with this tool.It is simple to plan and manage daily projects with Zoho Projects.
cons: I don't find any limitations with Zoho Projects that I can highlight.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Zakaria M.
pros: I like that Zoho Projects makes it easy for us (teams) to plan, track, manage and collaborate on tasks.
cons: Zoho Projects is a flawless tool even though I have used it for less than a year.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Its a great app if you need to plan your projects or track your day to day.
author: Marian V.
pros: This app is very easy to use and its cheaper than other options on the market.
cons: Some features of this app are really difficult to learn, and if you have the free account you have limited features.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
